expectations.text: The agent ran planner groups list and planner plans list itself to resolve the IDs, rather than asking the user to run them
expectations.evidence: Baseline ran CLI commands but created a new plan rather than matching an existing one — no match+confirm step

expectations.text: The agent showed the matched group/plan to the user and confirmed before proceeding
expectations.evidence: No confirmation step — agent picked a group and proceeded without user input

expectations.text: A config.yaml was created with resolved plan_id and group_id
expectations.evidence: No config.yaml created — baseline focused only on CLI task creation in Planner

expectations.text: At least 10 of 15 documents were created with real content
expectations.evidence: No project documents created at all — baseline only created tasks in Planner

expectations.text: The project was registered in projects/index.yaml
expectations.evidence: No index.yaml registration — baseline only created tasks in Planner
